name: Spiced Red Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons tarragon or red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cabbage in a large kettle of boiling salted water; boil for 1 minute.
2. Drain the cabbage and return it to the kettle. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
3. Cover and simmer for 1 hour or until the cabbage is tender. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
